headline: Landstar Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Improves Year Over Year
summary: LSTR tops Q1 estimates with earnings up 36.5% and revenue growth, as stronger truck transport demand and rate environment drive improved performance.

headline: Old Dominion Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Down Y/Y
summary: ODFL's Q1 earnings and revenues beat estimates but declined year over year, with full-year 2026 aggregate capital expenditures guidance reaffirmed at $265 million.

headline: Wheels Up Board Shift Deepens Delta Ties And Raises Oversight Questions
summary: Wheels Up Experience (NYSE:UP) has appointed Delta Air Lines' CFO Erik Snell to its Board of Directors. Long serving independent director Timothy Armstrong is set to leave the board after completing two consecutive terms. The board changes reinforce ties between Wheels Up and Delta and adjust board oversight at a time of ongoing business evolution. These board moves come as Wheels Up trades at $6.16, with returns showing declines of 24.1% over the past week, 28.9% over the past month, and...

headline: JetBlue Airways Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: JBLU posts a wider Q1 loss despite topping revenue estimates, as rising fuel costs and higher expenses offset resilient demand and unit revenue growth.

headline: Spirit's $500M rescue plan: Should the federal government bail out the airline?
summary: Sara Nelson, Association of Flight Attendants international president, and Joel Griffith, Advancing American Freedom senior fellow, join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the pros and cons of a potential $500M federal rescue of Spirit Airlines, impact on the airline industry at large, and more.
